Imports

dxgi, vtable

Types

DXGI_ADAPTER_DESC2 = object
  Description*: array[128, pointer]
  VendorId*: uint32
  DeviceId*: uint32
  SubSysId*: uint32
  Revision*: uint32
  DedicatedVideoMemory*: csize_t
  DedicatedSystemMemory*: csize_t
  SharedSystemMemory*: csize_t
  AdapterLuid*: uint64
  Flags*: uint32
  GraphicsPreemptionGranularity*: uint32
  ComputePreemptionGranularity*: uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_MODE_DESC1 = object
  Width*: uint32
  Height*: uint32
  RefreshRate*: DXGI_RATIONAL
  Format*: uint32
  ScanlineOrdering*: uint32
  Scaling*: uint32
  Stereo*: int32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_OUTDUPL_DESC = object
  ModeDesc*: DXGI_MODE_DESC
  Rotation*: uint32
  DesktopImageInSystemMemory*: int32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_OUTDUPL_FRAME_INFO = object
  LastPresentTime*: int64
  LastMouseUpdateTime*: int64
  AccumulatedFrames*: uint32
  RectsCoalesced*: int32
  ProtectedContentMaskedOut*: int32
  PointerPosition*: DXGI_OUTDUPL_POINTER_POSITION
  TotalMetadataBufferSize*: uint32
  PointerShapeBufferSize*: uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_OUTDUPL_MOVE_RECT = object
  SourcePoint*: pointer
  DestinationRect*: pointer
Source   Edit   
DXGI_OUTDUPL_POINTER_POSITION = object
  Position*: pointer
  Visible*: int32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_OUTDUPL_POINTER_SHAPE_INFO = object
  typ*: uint32
  Width*: uint32
  Height*: uint32
  Pitch*: uint32
  HotSpot*: pointer
Source   Edit   
DXGI_PRESENT_PARAMETERS = object
  DirtyRectsCount*: uint32
  pDirtyRects*: pointer
  pScrollRect*: pointer
  pScrollOffset*: pointer
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1 = object
  Width*: uint32
  Height*: uint32
  Format*: uint32
  Stereo*: int32
  SampleDesc*: DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC
  BufferUsage*: uint32
  BufferCount*: uint32
  Scaling*: uint32
  SwapEffect*: uint32
  AlphaMode*: uint32
  Flags*: uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FULLSCREEN_DESC = object
  RefreshRate*: DXGI_RATIONAL
  ScanlineOrdering*: uint32
  Scaling*: uint32
  Windowed*: int32
Source   Edit

Source   Edit

                      timeout_in_milliseconds: uint32;
                      frame_info: ptr DXGI_OUTDUPL_FRAME_INFO;
                      desktop_resource: pointer) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

Exports

DXGI_FORMAT_BC2_UNORM, DXGI_MAP_DISCARD, DXGI_COLOR_SPACE_RESERVED, DXGI_COLOR_SPACE_YCBCR_STUDIO_G24_TOPLEFT_P2020, DXGI_USAGE_READ_ONLY, DXGI_ADAPTER_FLAG_SOFTWARE, getFrameStatistics, DXGI_FORMAT_R1_UNORM, DXGI_FORMAT_R24_UNORM_X8_TYPELESS, DXGI_FORMAT_B8G8R8A8_UNORM_SRGB, DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32_SINT, DXGI_COLOR_SPACE_YCBCR_STUDIO_G24_LEFT_P2020, DXGI_FORMAT_IA44, DXGI_FORMAT_R32_SINT, DXGI_MAP_WRITE, createSurface, DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC, setGPUThreadPriority, DXGI_RESOURCE_PRIORITY_MAXIMUM, DXGI_FORMAT_R8_SNORM, DXGI_MODE_SCANLINE_ORDER_UNSPECIFIED, DXGI_ADAPTER_FLAG_REMOTE, DXGI_GAMMA_CONTROL, getDisplayModeList, createSwapChain, DXGI_FORMAT_R10G10B10A2_UINT, DXGI_COLOR_SPACE_RGB_FULL_G22_NONE_P2020, DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_SNORM, DXGI_RESIDENCY_EVICTED_TO_DISK, DXGI_FORMAT_BC1_UNORM_SRGB, DXGI_FORMAT_B5G6R5_UNORM, DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16_SINT, queryResourceResidency, IDXGIDeviceSubObject, DXGI_COLOR_SPACE_YCBCR_STUDIO_G2084_LEFT_P2020, LUID, makeWindowAssociation, getLastPresentCount, setEvictionPriority, DXGI_FORMAT_R16_SINT, DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_ALLOW_TEARING, DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_UINT, DXGI_RESIDENCY_RESIDENT_IN_SHARED_MEMORY, IDXGISurface1, DXGI_MODE_ROTATION_IDENTITY, DXGI_FORMAT_BC5_TYPELESS, DXGI_USAGE_SHADER_INPUT, D3DCOLORVALUE, DXGI_ENUM_MODES_SCALING, waitForVBlank, DXGI_FORMAT_R8_TYPELESS, DXGI_ADAPTER_FLAG_NONE,
